JavaScript test scripts for the `with` statement and mathematical functions like cosine and `Math.abs`.

- **[12.10-005.js](12.10-005.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of the `with` statement in JavaScript.
- **[12.10-006.js](12.10-006.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of the `with` statement in JavaScript using the `test` function.
- **[12.10-007.js](12.10-007.js.md)**: Tests the cosine function of PI using the `with` statement and asserts the result is -1.
